subject: IPO Readiness Assessment - Internal Review
body:
Strictly Confidential

Management Team,

Following our discussion about a potential IPO in 2027, here's our readiness assessment:

Financial Readiness: 6/10
- Need 2 years of audited financials (1 completed, 1 in progress)
- SOX compliance program needs to be established
- Internal controls framework requires documentation
- Revenue recognition policies need external review

Operational Readiness: 7/10
- Board composition needs 2 additional independent directors
- Audit committee requires financial expert designation
- Compensation committee charter needs updating
- Investor relations function needs to be built

Estimated preparation costs:
- External audit fees: $800K-$1.2M annually
- SOX compliance: $500K initial, $200K ongoing
- Legal fees (S-1 preparation): $2-3M
- Underwriter fees: 5-7% of offering

Recommend engaging a Big 4 firm by Q3 2026 to begin the transition from our current auditors.
